title: Add example integration to demo for useAsset

Points: 15
Estimated time: 1 day

### What needs doing
- Build a demo page at `packages/demo/app/demo/asset/page.tsx` that fetches asset metadata and displays it.
- Use USDC testnet defaults in the example.

### Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Demo compiles and displays asset details.

### Branch / Commit
- Suggested branch: `feature/demo-asset-example`
- Commit example: `feat(demo): add useAsset example page`

> Before pushing, run `git pull --rebase origin main` and resolve conflicts locally.
